## InstantUTC variable

Zod schema for UTC timestamps as JavaScript Date objects. Serializes to ISO format with 'Z' suffix.

**Signature:**

```typescript
InstantUTC: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodDate, 'InstantUTC'>
```
